biography: Tomas, representing Espoo Ringside Golf, has been a distinguished figure on the greens of the Hector Trophée, having competed in three past editions of this renowned pair competition. His presence in the field was consistently characterized by a quiet resolve and a deep respect for the traditions of the game, making him a truly memorable competitor during his tenure.

Across his three participations, Tomas consistently applied himself with diligence and focus. Despite his persistent endeavors and earnest play, he did not manage to secure either the coveted Hector Trophée for his pair or the prestigious individual Victor Trophy, a testament to the exceedingly high level of competition inherent in the event.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Tomas will regrettably not be gracing the fairways. He is now considered to be retired from Hector events, marking a deliberate conclusion to his active involvement in this specific tournament series. His contributions to the Hector Trophée, nonetheless, are remembered for the integrity and sportsmanship he brought to every round.
